allow: PowerShell($dst = "D:\\IT\\HeliosEDU\\public\\media"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dst | Out-Null; Copy-Item "E:\\ПТПИТ\\МАТАНАЛИЗ\\videoplayback \(1\).mp4" -Destination "$dst\\lesson-matan.mp4" -Force; Get-ChildItem $dst | Select-Object Name, @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}})

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3001/api/courses" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){ "READY"; $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if\(-not $ok\){"NOT_READY"})
